message.content:
@startuml
package platform
  MultiCameraCore_Configuration

  MultiCameraCore
    "C" MultiCameraCore
    multiCameraGoals : List<MultiCameraGoal>
    additionalFields : Map<String, Object>
    agentActions : List<CommunicationAction>
    MultiCameraCore()
    setup()
    initDependencyObjects()
    buildMCAFromConfigFile()
    init()
    executeMAPELLoop()
    removeNewInfo()
    monitor()
    analyse()
    plan()
    execute()
    createGlobalMap()
    getWorkingCameras()

  CameraManager
    "C" CameraManager
    id : String
    cameras : List<Camera>
    cameraIdMap : Map<String, Camera>
    CameraManager()
    initCameras()
    heartbeat()
    reinitNotWorkingCameras()
    initCamera()
    getWorkingCameras()
    getNotWorkingCameras()
    testSimpleAllCameras()
    addAndInitCameras()

  Heartbeat
    "C" Heartbeat
    timer : int
    cameraHeartbeatReceived : HashMap<String, Boolean>
    Heartbeat()
    init()
    recordHeartbeat()
    checkHeartBeats()

  AdaptationTypeManager
    "C" AdaptationTypeManager
    stringToAdaptationMap : HashMap<String, AdaptivePolicy>
    AdaptationTypeManager()
    getAdaptivePolicy()

  GlobalMap
    "C" GlobalMap
    swLong : double
    swLat : double
    neLong : double
    neLat : double
    GlobalMap()

  AnalysisTypeManager
    "C" AnalysisTypeManager
    stringToAnalysisMap : HashMap<String, ImageProcessor>
    AnalysisTypeManager()
    getImageProcessObject()

  map
    "C" map
    swLong : double
    swLat : double
    neLong : double
    neLat : double
    map()

  utilities
    "C" utilities
    heartbeat : HashMap<String, Boolean>
    cameraHeartbeatReceived : HashMap<String, Boolean>
    Heartbeat()
    init()
    recordHeartbeat()
    checkHeartBeats()

  imageAnalysis
    "C" imageAnalysis
    stringToAnalysisMap : HashMap<String, ImageProcessor>
    AnalysisTypeManager()
    getImageProcessObject()

  MultiCameraCore_Configuration
    "C" MultiCameraCore_Configuration
    LOGGER : Logger
    id : String
    cameraConfigurationFiles : List<String>
    multiCameraGoals : List<MultiCameraGoal>
    additionalFields : Map<String, Object>
    xstream : XStream
    XML_HEADER : String
    MultiCameraCore_Configuration()
    writeConfigurationToXML()
    readMCPConfig()
    createMCAFromMCPConfigurationFile()

  MultiCameraCore -- cameraManager : cameraManager
  CameraManager -- Heartbeat : heartbeat
  CameraManager -- AdaptationTypeManager : adaptationTypeManager
  CameraManager -- imageAnalysis : imageAnalysis
  CameraManager -- map : globalMap
  Heartbeat -- MultiCameraCore : multiCameraGoals
  Heartbeat -- MultiCameraCore : agentActions
  AdaptationTypeManager -- MultiCameraCore : multiCameraGoals
  AdaptationTypeManager -- MultiCameraCore : agentActions
  AnalysisTypeManager -- MultiCameraCore : multiCameraGoals
  AnalysisTypeManager -- MultiCameraCore : agentActions
  GlobalMap -- MultiCameraCore : multiCameraGoals
  GlobalMap -- MultiCameraCore : agentActions
  MultiCameraCore_Configuration -- MultiCameraCore : multiCameraGoals
  MultiCameraCore_Configuration -- MultiCameraCore : agentActions

@enduml
